scenarios.intent: Follow up after a product demo
key_facts: The demo was held on Monday
The client asked for pricing details
The proposal should be shared by Friday
The client is interested in the automation dashboard
scenarios.reference_email:
Subject: Follow-Up on Product Demo

Hi [Recipient Name],

Thank you for attending the product demo on Monday. I appreciate your interest in the automation dashboard and the questions you shared during the session.

As discussed, I will prepare the pricing details and share the proposal with you by Friday.

Please let me know if there is any additional information you would like included.

Best regards,
[Sender Name]

key_facts: The response was delayed due to internal review
The requested document is now ready
The team appreciates the client's patience
scenarios.reference_email:
Subject: Apology for the Delay

Hi [Recipient Name],

I apologize for the delay in getting back to you. The response was delayed due to internal review, and I understand this may have caused inconvenience.

The requested document is now ready, and our team appreciates your patience while we completed the review.

Please let me know if you need anything else.

Best regards,
[Sender Name]

key_facts: The client requested more detail about implementation timeline
The client wants a breakdown of support options
The response should ask for availability for a follow-up call
scenarios.reference_email:
Subject: Request for Proposal Details

Hi [Recipient Name],

Thank you for your interest. Could you please share more detail about the implementation timeline you have in mind and the support options you would like us to cover?

I would also be happy to schedule a follow-up call to discuss the proposal in more detail. Please let me know your availability.

Best regards,
[Sender Name]

scenarios.intent: Confirm next steps after a call
key_facts: The call took place on Tuesday
The updated timeline will be sent by Wednesday
The implementation owner will be confirmed after internal review
scenarios.reference_email:
Subject: Next Steps After Our Call

Hi [Recipient Name],

Thank you for the call on Tuesday. As discussed, I will send the updated timeline by Wednesday and confirm the implementation owner after our internal review.

Please let me know if you have any questions in the meantime.

Best regards,
[Sender Name]

scenarios.intent: Send an urgent reminder about a deadline
key_facts: The contract review deadline is tomorrow
The legal team needs the signed copy by end of day
The sender is available for a quick call if questions arise
scenarios.reference_email:
Subject: Reminder — Contract Review Deadline Tomorrow

Hi [Recipient Name],

This is a time-sensitive reminder that the contract review deadline is tomorrow. Our legal team needs the signed copy by end of day.

If you have any questions, I am available for a quick call today.

Best regards,
[Sender Name]

scenarios.intent: Thank a colleague for project support
key_facts: The colleague helped resolve a blocking issue last week
The project is back on schedule
The sender wants to acknowledge the extra effort
scenarios.reference_email:
Subject: Thanks for the Help Last Week

Hi [Recipient Name],

Just wanted to say thanks for helping resolve that blocking issue last week — the project is back on schedule because of your extra effort.

Really appreciate you jumping in.

Thanks,
[Sender Name]

key_facts: The review should cover Q2 performance metrics
The client prefers a 45-minute session
Two time slots are proposed for next week
scenarios.reference_email:
Subject: Quarterly Business Review — Scheduling

Hi [Recipient Name],

I would like to schedule our quarterly business review to cover Q2 performance metrics. I understand you prefer a 45-minute session.

Could you confirm whether either of the two time slots I proposed for next week works for you?

Best regards,
[Sender Name]

scenarios.intent: Notify about a planned maintenance window
key_facts: Maintenance is scheduled for Saturday from 2 AM to 6 AM
The platform may be unavailable during this window
Support will monitor the rollout and share an update afterward
scenarios.reference_email:
Subject: Planned Maintenance Window — Saturday

Hi [Recipient Name],

Please be advised that maintenance is scheduled for Saturday from 2 AM to 6 AM. The platform may be unavailable during this window.

Our support team will monitor the rollout and share an update afterward.

Best regards,
[Sender Name]

scenarios.intent: Follow up on an unanswered RFP question
key_facts: Question 7 about data retention was submitted on April 10
The compliance team is preparing the official answer
The full RFP response will be sent by April 20
scenarios.reference_email:
Subject: Follow-Up on RFP Question 7

Hi [Recipient Name],

I am following up on question 7 about data retention, which was submitted on April 10. Our compliance team is preparing the official answer.

We expect to send the full RFP response by April 20.

Best regards,
[Sender Name]

scenarios.intent: Invite a client to a product roadmap session
key_facts: The session will preview features planned for the next release
The client feedback will help prioritize the backlog
The session is planned for the last week of the month
scenarios.reference_email:
Subject: Invitation — Product Roadmap Session

Hi [Recipient Name],

I would like to invite you to a product roadmap session that will preview features planned for the next release. Your feedback will help us prioritize the backlog.

The session is planned for the last week of the month. Please let me know if that timeframe works for you.

Best regards,
[Sender Name]
